subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The letter which thou hadst written to his honour Haydar-'Alí was noted. From the [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه ای که بحضرت حیدر قبل علی مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید از شدت
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @nearness and remoteness, @spiritual transformation
